message:

echo "=== Check: no remaining JTAG port references in wrapper ==="
grep -n "\.tck\|\.tms\|\.tdi\|\.trst_n" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" && echo "FOUND JTAG refs (bad)" || echo "No JTAG port refs (good)"

echo ""
echo "=== Check: SWD ports now present ==="
grep -n "\.swclk\|\.swdi\|\.swdo\|\.halted" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Verify fix: compute_ss instantiation in wrapper ===
// Compute subsystem instantiation
// NOTE (PnR fix): wrapper was generated with JTAG ports (tck/tms/tdi/trst_n)
// but compute_ss uses SWD (swclk/swdi/swdo/swdo_en). Replaced with correct SWD
// port connections; debug inputs are tied-off as no SWD pad exists in this wrapper.
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
    .clk(clk_in),
    .reset_n(reset_n_xres_h_n),
    .swclk(1'b0),
    .swdi(1'b0),
    .swdo(),
    .swdo_en(),
    .halted(),
    .qspi_sck(),
    .qspi_ce_n(),
    .qspi_din(4'b0),
    .qspi_dout(),
    .qspi_douten(),
    .clk_rst_pwr_prdata(32'b0),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pready(1'b1),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pslverr(1'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_prdata(32'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_pready(1'b1),
    .io_cfg_ss_pslverr(1'b0),
    .gpioa_in(w_gpioa_in),
    .gpioa_out(w_gpioa_out),
    .gpioa_oe(w_gpioa_oe),
    .gpiob_in(w_gpiob_in),
    .gpiob_out(w_gpiob_out),
    .gpiob_oe(w_gpiob_oe),
    .gpioc_in(w_gpioc_in),
    .gpioc_out(w_gpioc_out),
    .gpioc_oe(w_gpioc_oe)
);

endmodule

`default_nettype wire

=== Check: no remaining JTAG port references in wrapper ===
No JTAG port refs (good)

=== Check: SWD ports now present ===
2367:    .swclk(1'b0),
2368:    .swdi(1'b0),
2369:    .swdo(),
2370:    .swdo_en(),
2371:    .halted(),
